svg.title: From one backyard to every state: a pickleball timeline
svg.desc: A timeline of pickleball. 1965, the dare: Frank Pritchard, 13, tells his dad to go make up a game, so Joel Pritchard and Bill Bell head for the paved badminton court behind the cabin. 1968, the company: Pritchard, McCallum, Bell and friends incorporate Pickle Ball Inc., each putting in 500 dollars, and a boxed set with paddles, balls and a net is 29 dollars and 95 cents. 1976, the first tournament: the first known pickleball tournament is played at the South Center Athletic Club in Tukwila, Washington, eleven years after the backyard. 1984, the rulebook: the United States Amateur Pickleball Association forms and publishes the first rulebook, and by 1990 the game is played in all fifty states. 2022, the state sport: Washington makes pickleball its official state sport, 57 years after the backyard, and the state Senate votes for it 46 to 1. Today, the habit: tens of millions of Americans now play, the exact count moves every year, and the rules the three of them wrote in 1965 do not.

g.text: FROM ONE BACKYARD TO EVERY STATE
THE ROAD FROM A BORED THIRTEEN-YEAR-OLD TO A NATIONAL HABIT
THE DARE
Frank Pritchard, 13, tells his dad to go make up a game. Joel Pritchard
and Bill Bell head for the paved badminton court behind the cabin.
THE COMPANY
Pritchard, McCallum, Bell and friends incorporate Pickle Ball Inc., each
putting in $500. A boxed set with paddles, balls and a net is $29.95.
THE FIRST TOURNAMENT
The first known pickleball tournament is played at the South Center
Athletic Club in Tukwila, Washington, eleven years after the backyard.
THE RULEBOOK
The United States Amateur Pickleball Association forms and publishes
the first rulebook. By 1990 the game is played in all fifty states.
THE STATE SPORT
Washington makes pickleball its official state sport, 57 years after
the backyard. The state Senate votes for it 46 to 1.
TODAY
THE HABIT
Tens of millions of Americans now play. The exact count moves
every year. The rules the three of them wrote in 1965 do not.
